meaning: adj.自给自足的,经济独立的
examples: Some one did not satisfy the autarkic consumed mode. They tried to build a big house which is bigger than their need to display to others.
India is developing into an open-market economy, yet traces of its past autarkic policies remain.
It has served as the model of the autarkic command economy that East bloc countries like Poland have largely been forced to emulate.
